# UK Small Business Toolkit
> Free tools and calculators for UK small business owners, sole traders, and limited company directors.
> All figures use 2025/26 HMRC rates. Independently operated. Not financial or legal advice.

## About
UK Small Business Toolkit provides 18 free tools across 5 categories covering tax, VAT, business structure, finance, payroll, and compliance. Every tool uses current UK rates and is self-contained — no login, no data collection, no paywalls.

## Tool Index

### Tax & Compliance
- Corporation Tax Calculator UK 2025/26: /corporation-tax-calculator.html
- VAT Calculator UK: /vat-calculator.html
- VAT Return Calculator: /vat-return-calculator.html
- Flat Rate Scheme Calculator: /flat-rate-scheme-calculator.html
- Capital Allowances Calculator 2025/26: /capital-allowances-calculator.html

### Business Structure
- Sole Trader vs Ltd Company Calculator: /sole-trader-vs-ltd.html
- Ltd Company Cost Calculator: /ltd-company-cost-calculator.html
- Business Structure Guide UK: /business-structure-guide.html

### Finance & Cashflow
- Profit Margin Calculator: /profit-margin-calculator.html
- Break-Even Calculator: /break-even-calculator.html
- Invoice Generator UK: /invoice-generator.html
- Director Loan Account Calculator: /director-loan-calculator.html

### Payroll & HR
- Business Mileage Calculator UK 2025/26: /business-mileage-calculator.html
- Statutory Pay Calculator: /statutory-pay-calculator.html
- National Living Wage Checker 2025/26: /national-living-wage-checker.html
- MTD Checker: /mtd-checker.html

### Deadlines & Compliance
- Companies House Deadlines Checker: /companies-house-deadlines.html
- Late Filing Penalty Calculator: /late-filing-penalty-calculator.html

## Supporting Pages
- Homepage (all tools): /index.html
- About: /about.html
- Privacy Policy: /privacy.html
- Contact: /contact.html

## Rate Update Policy
All tax rates, NMW rates, and statutory pay figures updated each April following the new UK tax year.
